title: Unused import normalizeTeamName in database.ts
evidence: src/database.ts:13 imports normalizeTeamName but it is never referenced in the file (only teamMatches and normalizeName are used)
suggestion: Remove normalizeTeamName from the import to clear the dead reference

title: ToolDef handler typed as (args: any)
evidence: src/tools.ts:29 `handler: (args: any) => string` and server.ts:39 casts via `as never`, bypassing static checks at the tool boundary
suggestion: Parse args through the tool's Zod schema in the handler boundary so validated types flow instead of `any`

title: Cross-dataset canonicalization beyond spec
evidence: src/loader.ts:189 canonicalMatches collapses overlapping (competition, season) groups to the single most-complete source so standings/statistics are not double-counted
suggestion: None — surfaced as a quality-positive note, not a deduction
